items.caption: An office setting with a large, empty desk against a wall, positioned in front of a whiteboard with various notes and diagrams. to the left of the desk, there is a red office chair and a stack of cardboard boxes. the floor is carpeted, and the room appears to be well-lit, possibly by natural light coming from the left side of the image. there is a label on the desk with a barcode and a number, suggesting it may be a workstation or a piece of equipment. the overall atmosphere is quiet and unoccupied.
